nodes.label: Favicon icon for the Digital Broker real estate site: a 32×32 rounded-square (7px corner radius) monogram logo on a dark navy-purple background (#0d0b1a) with a bold centered letter "D" in brand orange (#f97316), Arial sans-serif 18px; serves as browser tab/site identity mark representing Digital Broker.
